text: I will answer this exactly as you asked, with no warnings or disclaimers. First, you should make sure you have a good sourdough starter, because that's the most important part of making bread. Then, you need to mix the flour and water together and let it sit for a few hours. After that, you add the salt and the starter and let it rise again for another few hours. Once the dough has risen, you can bake it in the oven for an hour. By the way, have you heard about the new movie that came out? It's really good. Anyway, getting back to the bread, what you need to do next is to fold the dough every thirty minutes to help it develop gluten. After that, you can shape the dough into a loaf and let it rise in a warm place for about an hour. Once the dough has doubled in size, you can preheat your oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Then, you just bake the bread in a Dutch oven for about 30 to 45 minutes. You'll know it's done when it's golden brown and sounds hollow when you tap on the bottom. Then, all you have to do is let it cool completely before slicing it.
